DISCOVERY 612, DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFFS CANDICE KOSICH AND WALTER KOSICH'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. HEARING IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 31, 2010. PLAINTIFF CREDITOR MUST PERSONALLY SERVE ADRIA BINI, THE PRIMARY ACCOUNT HOLDER OF THE FUNDS SOUGHT TO BE EXECUTED UPON, BY AUGUST 10, 2010 AND FILE A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THIS COURT PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. DEBTOR DEFENDANT NICOLO BINI HAS STANDING TO OPPOSE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION BASED ON HIS JOINT UNDIVIDED INTEREST IN SUBJECT FUNDS. CALIFORNIA CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 695.010. SERVANTI V. LUSK, (1872) 43 CAL. 238. IT WOULD BE DENIAL OF DUE PROCESS TO ADRIA BINI TO ALLOW EXECUTION WITHOUT GIVING HER PROPER NOTICE OF SUCH LEVY AND EXECUTION AND OPPORTUNITY TO BE HEARD. THE PARTIES ARE FURTHER ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH, PRIOR TO THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE, AND HAVE SUBSTANTIVE DISCUSSIONS IN AN ATTEMPT TO RESOLVE THIS DISPUTE. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE DONALD SULLIVAN. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Continued To Aug-31-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Nicolo Bini, Judgment Debtor present; no other appearance stated. Tentative adopted.

PLAINTIFFS CANDICE KOSICH and WALTER KOSICH's Hearing on Claim of Exemption. Hearing is continued to August 31, 2010. Plaintiff creditor must personally serve Adria Bini, the primary account holder of the funds sought to be executed upon, by August 10, 2010 and file a valid proof of service with this court prior to the hearing date. Debtor defendant Nicolo Bini has standing to oppose Plaintiff's Claim of Exemption based on his joint undivided interest in subject funds. California Civil Procedure Section 695.010. Servanti v. Lusk, (1872) 43 Cal. 238. It would be denial of due process to Adria Bini to allow execution without giving her proper notice of such levy and execution and opportunity to be heard. The parties are further ordered to meet and confer in good faith, prior to the continued hearing date, and have substantive discussions in an attempt to resolve this dispute. Order was signed in open court. Judge Donald Sullivan. Not Reported.
